strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with core stack: TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Hands-on AI agent development at re:cinq — MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks
Strong testing culture: TDD/CI/CD practitioner, authored test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), taught testing courses
concerns: No Nest.js experience mentioned; frontend depth leans Ember.js over React
No Kotlin exposure and only limited Java (robotics work in 2016-2018) for secondary backend services
Testing stack listed in JD (Vitest, Jest, Playwright) not explicitly named, though Selenium and D-language tooling are
response.justification: The candidate exceeds the 6+ year requirement with roughly 15 years of professional development, including recent fullstack TypeScript/Node.js product work at re:cinq and Optilyz with React, MongoDB, and AWS CDK — directly matching the primary stack. The required AI agent development experience is concretely evidenced by MCP code generators and agentic workflow infrastructure in his current role. Cloud/containerization is covered (Kubernetes deployment of GISCollective, Docker in dev-ops work at Altom), and testing expertise is exceptional, spanning TDD practice, test-framework authorship, and teaching. Gaps are secondary: Nest.js is absent from the résumé, Kotlin is not listed, and Java exposure is dated, but polyglot history (D, C++, Swift, PHP, Java) suggests fast ramp-up. A CS bachelor's degree satisfies the education requirement.
